decision_options.label: Accept repair for validation rerun
decision_options.effect: Allows M41-02 to record explicit acceptance and M41-03 to rerun validation; does not promote runtime.

decision_options.label: Request different repair
decision_options.effect: Keeps the recipe advisory and asks for another repair candidate.

decision_options.label: Reject recipe runtime candidate
decision_options.effect: Keeps this recipe out of future fixture promotion gates.
